title: Orbit Stitcher: Cheapest Multicolor Embroidery Run
strategies: input-order construction, jumping whenever not adjacent (checker baseline)
color-locked global plan: sort segments by color (minimal color changes) and chain monochromatic trails with nearest-neighbor jumps across the whole lattice

orbit-interleave hybrid: Eulerian-style trail cover inside each congruent region (orbit representative) plus a TSP tour over the region orbit, deliberately re-buying color changes when the group geometry makes one lattice sweep cheaper than one color sweep per color
